name: agent-workforce-agents
description: A collection of proactive agents — showcase examples for Agent Workforce.

scripts.test: rm -rf .test-build && tsc --noEmit false --outDir .test-build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs; status=$?; rm -rf .test-build; exit $status
scripts.compile: for d in */persona.ts; do agentworkforce persona compile "$d"; done
